title: lobelia holstii
intro: Lobelia holstii, also known as Indian tobacco, is a plant species that belongs to the Lobelia genus and is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia holstii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural cough suppressant. Lobelia holstii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through smoking, infusion, or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
